name: inventrack
description: A web-based inventory management system with dashboard, REST API, and reporting.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src=__dirname;const dest=process.env.INIT_CWD||process.cwd();['api','backend','frontend','vercel.json','README.md'].forEach(f=>{const s=path.join(src,f),d=path.join(dest,f);if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.cpSync(s,d,{recursive:true});console.log('\u2705 Copied: '+f);}});console.log('\n\ud83c\udf89 Inventrack project files copied!');"
